hooks.command:
[ -d .codixing ] || exit 0; jq -r '.tool_input as $t | if (($t.path // "") | test("\.[a-zA-Z0-9]+$")) then empty elif (($t.pattern // "") | length < 3) then empty elif (($t.pattern // "") | test("^v?[0-9]+\.[0-9]")) then empty elif (($t.output_mode // "") == "count") then empty elif (($t.path // "") | test("(target/|node_modules/|\.git/|\.codixing/)")) then empty elif (($t.pattern // "") | test("^(<<<<|>>>>|https?://|/|\./)")) then empty elif (($t.glob // "") | test("\.(rs|py|ts|tsx|js|jsx|go|java|c|cpp|h|hpp|cs|rb|swift|kt|scala|php|zig|bash|sh|md|html|json|toml|yaml|yml)($|\})")) or (($t.type // "") | test("^(rs|rust|py|python|ts|typescript|js|javascript|go|java|c|cpp|cs|rb|ruby|swift|kotlin|scala|php|zig|md|markdown|json|toml|yaml|html)$")) or (($t.glob // "") == "" and ($t.type // "") == "" and (($t.pattern // "") | test("^[A-Za-z_]")) and (($t.pattern // "") | length > 2)) then {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","additionalContext":"CODIXING: Use the codixing CLI instead of Grep for code/doc/config search.

  codixing search "<query>"   — semantic search (code, docs, config)
  codixing symbols <name>      — find definitions
  codixing usages <name>       — find call sites and imports
  codixing callers <file>      — who imports this file
  codixing callees <file>      — what this file imports

Run via Bash. Passthrough: version strings, single-file targets, count mode, short patterns."}} else empty end'
